nasb.text: The sons of Mushi: Mahli, Eder and Jerimoth. These were the sons of the Levites according to their fathers’ households.

esv.text: The sons of Mushi: Mahli, Eder, and Jerimoth. These were the sons of the Levites according to their fathers’ houses.

cnv.text: 母示的兒子是末力、以得和耶利摩；以上這些都是利未的子孫，按著他們的家族記錄。

ccb.text: 姆示的儿子末力、以得、耶利摩。这些按宗族都是利未人的后代。
